news.headline: Ingram Micro (NYSE: INGM) plans to cut 850 jobs by Q1 2025 for long-term growth and organizational efficiency.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Ingram Micro Holding Corporation (NYSE: INGM) revealed plans to implement a restructuring program that will result in a decrease of around 850 employees by the conclusion of the first quarter of 2025. The objective of these initiatives is to improve operational efficiency and bolster customer service operations, ultimately positioning the company more effectively for sustained growth in the future. As part of its regular practices, Ingram Micro is dedicated to...

news.headline: Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK) to join Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Investor Conference on Dec 10, 2024, 1:40 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In New York, Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK), the top cloud platform for assured integrated reporting, will partake in Raymond James' 2024 TMT & Consumer Investor Conference. CEO Julie Iskow is set to present on December 10, 2024, at 1:40 p.m. ET. The event will be live webcast, with a recording accessible for a limited time on Workiva's investor relations site. Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK) is a leading name in this sector.

news.headline: Anirudh Devgan from Cadence will speak at a Nasdaq event.
news.summary: In the latest data release, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous quarter. This improvement in employment numbers is a promising sign for the economy, as more than 300,000 new jobs were added in various sectors. The robust job market has also led to a rise in consumer spending by 5.8%, indicating increased confidence and economic activity. Additionally, average hourly wages have seen a 2.5% growth, providing further support for working individuals. Overall, the positive trend in employment and economic indicators suggests a strengthening of the labor market and potential for continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: OPAL Fuels appoints Darrell Birck as EVP of Biogas. Birck will oversee the company's biogas operations, part of its cleaner fuel mission.
news.summary: WHITE PLAINS, N.Y.-- OPAL Fuels Inc. shared that Darrell P. Birck has been appointed as the new Executive Vice President of Biogas. With OPAL listed on Nasdaq as OPAL, this hiring news comes alongside current Co-CEOs Adam Comora and Jonathan Maurer. Effective immediately, Darrell will oversee the company's biogas construction and operations sectors, aligning with OPAL Fuels' goal of offering affordable and environmentally friendly fuel solutions. This decision aims to enhance the company's commitment to delivering sustainable and cost-effective energy alternatives.

news.headline: Albemarle Corp to join virtual chat at Deutsche Bank's Lithium & Battery Supply Chain Conference. Chief Commercial Officer to speak.
news.summary: Albemarle Corporation, a major player in supplying key elements for various industries, shared that Eric Norris, the chief commercial officer, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Deutsche... event. This news was made public on December 2, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company, listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ALB, focuses on facilitating mobility, energy, connectivity, and health sectors.

news.headline: Murphy Family Ventures and Smithfield reach agreement to revive the family farming business founded in 1962.
news.summary: In Wallace, North Carolina and Smithfield, Virginia on December 2, 2024, Murphy Family Ventures and Smithfield revealed a definitive agreement to revive the Murphy family farming enterprise that originated in 1962 under Wendell Murphy. This historic deal is set to rejuvenate a significant player in modern agriculture.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. to host investor meeting in NYC on Dec 17 from 8 am to 12 pm ET.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. announced they will hold an informal management meeting for investors in New York City on December 17 from 8:00 am to around 12:00 pm ET. The meeting will focus on the company's operating performance and future prospects.

news.headline: MAA announces quarterly preferred dividend of $1.0625 per share on Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Germantown, Tennessee, MAA (NYSE: MAA) disclosed its decision to issue a complete quarterly dividend amounting to $1.0625 for every outstanding share of its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. This dividend is scheduled for disbursement on December 31st.

news.headline: SM Energy appoints Dr. Ashwin Venkatraman as independent director and Audit Committee member.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 2, 2024, SM Energy Company (NYSE: SM) appointed Dr. Ashwin Venkatraman as an independent director and a member of the Audit Committee. Dr. Venkatraman's appointment comes under the chairmanship of Julio Quintana. This move aims to enhance corporate governance and strategic decision-making within the Board.

news.headline: ONE Gas to join Jefferies Gas Utilities Mini-Conference on Dec 9, 2024, and Mizuho Power, Energy, & Infrastructure Conference.
news.summary: One Gas, Inc. (stock symbol: OGS) revealed plans to attend the Jefferies Gas Utilities Mini-Conference online on Monday, Dec. 9, 2024. They will also be part of the Mizuho Power, Energy, & Infrastructure Conference in New York City on a later date. The event will take place virtually and one day later, they will be at the physical conference in New York City.

news.headline: Stewart Information Services (NYSE: STC) declares $0.50/share dividend for Q4 2024, payable Dec 30 to stockholders.
news.summary: The announcement was made by Stewart Information Services Corporation in Houston on December 2, 2024. The company's Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.50 per share for the fourth quarter of 2024. This dividend is set to be paid on December 30, 2024, to common stockholders recorded on December 16, 2024, under the symbol STC on the New York Stock Exchange.

news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CAPR) to present at investor conferences.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, a biotechnology company known as Capricor Therapeutics (NASDAQ: CAPR) based in San Diego revealed its plans to participate in upcoming investor conferences. The company specializes in creating innovative cell and exosome-based treatments for rare diseases. This development showcases the company’s commitment to engaging with investors to discuss its strategies and advancements in the biotechnology sector.

news.headline: Certara celebrates 2024 research success with over 100 papers published, 12 scientists listed in top 2% cited researchers.
news.summary: The organization is commemorating the achievement of having 12 of its scientists recognized on the prestigious Stanford/Elsevier list of top 2% cited researchers.

news.headline: Ocean Power Technologies expects profitability in late 2025 with record quarterly revenues & reduced expenses.
news.summary: The company has confirmed that it is on track to achieve profitability by late 2025. This projection is backed by the recent achievement of record high quarterly revenues and significant reduction in expenses. The company's success in generating increased revenue along with a substantial decrease in costs puts it in a strong position to reach profitability by the specified time frame.

news.headline: Wabash renews partnership with Goodyear as preferred tire supplier for trailers, expanding service access for customers.
news.summary: A recent agreement will provide improved tire service access for Wabash customers by utilizing Goodyear's vast service network. This partnership aims to enhance convenience and efficiency for customers, allowing them to benefit from a broader range of tire services. Wabash clients can now access Goodyear's extensive network, which includes over 2,000 locations across the country. This collaboration aims to enhance the overall customer experience by offering increased accessibility to tire services through a well-established network.

news.headline: Microchip Technology to present at UBS Global Technology & AI Conference on Dec 3, 2024, 3:35 pm MT by CEO Steve Sanghi. Webcast available on Microchip website.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on Dec. 02, 2024, Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) disclosed that they will participate in the UBS Global Technology and AI Conference on Dec. 3, 2024, at 3:35 p.m. (Mountain Time). The speaker will be Mr. Steve Sanghi, President and CEO of the company. A live webcast of the event will be streamed by UBS and can be viewed on Microchip's website, www.microchip.com.

news.headline: Microchip Tech revises down Dec 2024 quarter revenue guidance, also unveils manufacturing restructuring plans.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on December 2, 2024, Microchip Technology Incorporated, a prominent supplier of smart, connected, and secure embedded control solutions, released a revised revenue forecast for the December 2024 quarter. Alongside this update, the company revealed plans for manufacturing restructuring.

news.headline: Treace appoints Guy Guglielmino as Chief Commercial Officer; will drive commercial efforts and growth.
news.summary: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on December 2, 2024, Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (known as "Treace" or "the Company") operating on NasdaqGS as TMCI, a renowned medical technology company revolutionizing the surgical treatment of bunions and associated midfoot deformities with its notable Lapiplasty® and Adductoplasty® Procedures, disclosed the appointment of Guy Guglielmino as the Chief Commercial Officer. In his new role, Mr. Guglielmino is tasked with spearheading Treace's commercial initiatives and playing a critical part in propelling the Company into the next phase of rapid innovation, strategic product commercialization, and overall expansion.

news.headline: Black Hills Corp's Iowa gas utility approved for new rates to recover $100 million in pipeline investments.
news.summary: In Rapid City, South Dakota, on December 2, 2024, Black Hills Corp. revealed that its Iowa natural gas utility, Black Hills/Iowa Gas Utility Company, LLC (operating as Black Hills Energy), has been granted approval by the Iowa Utilities Commission for updated rates. The new rates aim to recoup about $100 million invested in the pipeline system since the utility's prior rate submission in 2021. This move is part of Black Hills Corp.'s strategic efforts to enhance its operations and ensure sustainable growth in the energy sector, as disclosed by the company.

news.headline: Rayonier announces special dividend of $1.80 per share, payable 25% in cash and 75% in common shares on Jan 30, 2025.
news.summary: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) disclosed that its board of directors has approved a special dividend of $1.80 per common share, to be distributed to shareholders on January 30, 2025. This one-time dividend will be a mix of cash and the Company's common shares, benefitting shareholders of record on December 12, 2024. The decision for this special dividend primarily stems from taxable gains resulting from a timberland disposition totaling $495 million.

news.headline: Bowman increases share repurchase program to $35 million from $25 million; about $16 million still available. Termination: July 31, 2025.
news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd., a national engineering services firm, has recently increased its share repurchase program from $25 million to up to $35 million. The Board of Directors authorized this on November 29, 2024, with around $16 million still available for repurchase. The program is set to conclude on July 31, 2025.

news.headline: United Rentals (NYSE: URI) honored for veteran hiring with 2024 HIRE Vets Medallion Platinum Award and 2025 Military Friendly® Employer Gold recognition.
news.summary: In Stamford, Conn., United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI), the leading equipment rental company globally, revealed that it has been honored with the prestigious 2024 HIRE Vets Medallion Platinum Award and 2025 Military Friendly® Employer Gold recognition. These awards showcase the company's dedication in recruiting, employing, and retaining veterans across the nation. The HIRE Vets Medallion Award, bestowed by the U.S. Department of Labor, stands as the exclusive federal veterans employment award.

news.headline: Research indicates that Trump’s inauguration may signal peak for crypto market. Typically, markets perform well post-election before plateauing when new president assumes office.
news.summary: Historical data indicates that markets tend to perform well following presidential elections, with a robust increase in several key indices. However, once the President-elect assumes office, market growth tends to stagnate or slow down. This pattern highlights the impact of political transitions on market performance.

news.headline: Coca-Cola updates environmental goals to focus on water, packaging, climate, and agriculture, aiming for long-term resilience.
news.summary: In Atlanta, The Coca-Cola Company recently unveiled new voluntary environmental objectives, replacing prior goals concerning water, packaging, climate, and agriculture. This strategic shift stems from insights acquired over years of sustainability efforts, ongoing assessments, and emerging challenges. The revised goals are designed to enhance business sustainability and contribute to community well-being. The company aims to implement these initiatives to create a lasting positive influence, with a focus on long-term resilience, and local impact.

news.headline: Trutankless™ releases GEN3 model, offering endless hot water, improved efficiency, U.S.-made. OTec: TKLS.
news.summary: A new U.S.-made GEN3 model, introduced by Trutankless™ (OTC: TKLS), offers faster, smarter, and more affordable hot water solutions. Released in SCOTTSDALE on Dec. 2, 2024, the model promises endless hot water, exceptional efficiency, and adaptable design for homes. This advancement is set to revolutionize residential electric tankless water systems, marked by its superior features and benefits.

news.headline: Honeywell and Bombardier sign agreement for next-gen aviation technology; Includes Honeywell Anthem avionics, more powerful engines, and satellite comms; Honeywell updates 2024 outlook.
news.summary: The recent agreement involves a partnership for collaborative research and development focused on Honeywell Anthem avionics, in addition to the selection of upgraded engines and advanced satellite communications technologies for Bombardier aircraft. These initiatives are aimed at enhancing the aircraft's aftermarket offerings. The partnership is expected to generate significant revenue for Honeywell through the incorporation of innovative technologies in Bombardier aircraft.

news.headline: Private placement by Skyharbour to raise up to C$8.5 million through a brokered deal.
news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. The country's GDP has also seen a significant growth of 3.8%, showing positive signs of economic recovery. Additionally, the stock market has reached a record high, with the main index rising by 15% in the last quarter. These numbers reflect a promising outlook for the nation's economy, indicating potential for further growth and prosperity in the coming months.

news.headline: Architect Kazuyo Sejima joins US-Japan Foundation as Trustee, enhancing cross-cultural initiatives.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, prominent Japanese architect Kazuyo Sejima was appointed as a Trustee for the United States-Japan Foundation (USJF). This appointment underscores her increasing impact in fostering international cultural interactions and partnerships. Sejima's involvement is expected to bring innovative perspectives to the foundation's activities.

news.headline: American Homes 4 Rent prices $500M public offering of 5.250% Senior Notes due 2035.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, American Homes 4 Rent (NYSE: AMH) disclosed the pricing details of an offering by its operating partnership, American Homes 4 Rent, L.P. The offering consists of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 5.250% Senior Notes due in the future.

news.headline: Inari Medical gets reimbursement approval for ClotTriever® system in Japan and partners with Medikit Co., Ltd. to expand access.
news.summary: Approval has been granted for reimbursement, enabling broader availability of a secure and efficient thrombus removal procedure for individuals with deep vein thrombosis (DVT) in Japan. This will benefit a significant number of patients who struggle with DVT, a condition with potential life-threatening complications. The approval paves the way for improved treatment options and better healthcare outcomes for those affected by DVT in Japan.

news.headline: Financial services company Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT) to present at Sidoti December Virtual Investor Conference on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: A financial services company, Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT), based in San Carlos, California, reported on December 2, 2024, that it is set to take part in the forthcoming Sidoti December Virtual Investor Conference.

news.headline: Oncocyte's dd-cfDNA assay detects kidney transplant rejection 11+ months early. Published in Nephrology Dialysis Transplantation.
news.summary: Oncocyte Corp., a diagnostics technology company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol OCX, disclosed positive new findings pertaining to its primary test VitaGraft™ in a recent publication within the medical journal Nephrology Dialysis Transplantation. This announcement was made on Dec. 2, 2024, from Irvine, California.

news.headline: Aimfinity Investment Corp. extends deadline for initial business combination to Dec 28, 2024 with $60,000 payment.
news.summary: Wilmington, Delaware - Aimfinity Investment Corp. I (Nasdaq: AIMAU) disclosed plans to prolong the timeframe for finalizing its initial business merger from November 28, 2024, to December 28, 2024. To achieve this, I-Fa Chang, sponsor manager of the Company, contributed $60,000 (Monthly Extension Payment) to the Trust Account on November 27, 2024. Aimfinity is a special purpose acquisition company registered as a Cayman Islands exempted entity.

news.headline: Credo Technology Group (Nasdaq: CRDO) reports Q2 fiscal year 2025 financial results ended Nov 2, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in San Jose, California, Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (Nasdaq: CRDO), a company specializing in secure, high-speed connectivity solutions to enhance energy efficiency in the data infrastructure market, announced its financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, concluding on November 2, 2024.

news.headline: vTv Therapeutics to attend Evercore HealthCONx Conference in Coral Gables, Florida from December 3-5, 2024 (Nasdaq: VTVT)
news.summary: A clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, vTv Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: VTVT), based in High Point, North Carolina, disclosed that its management will engage in a fireside chat and offer one-on-one meetings at the 7th Annual Evercore HealthCONx Conference in Coral Gables, Florida, from December 3 to 5, 2024. Specializing in novel small molecules, the company's primary focus is on diabetes treatments. This move showcases the company's commitment to engaging with potential investors and stakeholders in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: CleanSpark reports record FY 2024 results: Revenue up 125% year over year, hashrate exceeds 33.5 EH/s nearing 37 EH/s.
news.summary: CleanSpark, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSK) announced impressive financial performance with a 125% year-over-year revenue growth. The current hashrate has exceeded 33.5 EH/s and is expected to reach 37 EH/s. This was disclosed in their recent report for the fiscal year ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Calamos closed-end funds announce monthly distributions in Dec 2024 to shareholders with notification of sources.
news.summary: In the city of Chicago, Illinois, on December 2, 2024, Calamos Investments®* disclosed the monthly distributions and distribution sources for December 2024 to investors of its seven closed-end funds. These distributions are in accordance with the funds' distribution plans. The specific details of the fund distribution were not included.

news.headline: OrthoPediatrics Corp. sponsors IPOS as Emerald-Level Sponsor at 20th annual symposium, hosting educational & networking events.
news.summary: Continuing its corporate partnership with IPOS, the company has maintained its status as an Emerald-level sponsor. This partnership signifies a commitment to supporting IPOS initiatives and events at the highest level. The company's ongoing support is crucial in furthering IPOS's mission and reaching its goals.

news.headline: Colliers partners with leading architecture firm to expand national footprint and boost strategic planning capabilities.
news.summary: Increase in geographical coverage and advancement in architectural and strategic planning expertise are witnessed with the recent expansion. The venture showcases a significant growth in presence across the country and a substantial boost in skills related to architectural and strategic planning.

news.headline: US government imposes stricter regulations on semiconductor exports to China affecting Lam Research Corp. Business impact analyzed.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Fremont, California, Lam Research Corp. (Nasdaq: LRCX) released a statement regarding the recent announcement by the U.S. government about additional restrictions on semiconductor technology exports to China. The impact of these measures on Lam's business is currently being evaluated, with key considerations being the potential changes in export numbers and revenue related to China. The company is closely monitoring the situation to assess any potential implications and will provide updates as more information becomes available.

news.headline: Parsons-led joint venture delivers $27 billion Riyadh Metro project on 27 November 2024 with Egis and SYSTRA as consultants.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) revealed that the $27 billion Riyadh Metro was officially inaugurated on November 27, 2024. Parsons, in collaboration with Egis and SYSTRA under the Riyadh Metro Transit Consultants (RMTC) joint venture, served as consultants for two contracts of the project managed by the Royal Commission for Riyadh City (RCRC). The successful completion of these contracts marks a significant milestone in the project's development.

news.headline: TransMedics appoints Gerardo Hernandez as CFO and updates financial outlook for 2024. Nasdaq: TMDX.
news.summary: Today, in Andover, Massachusetts, TransMedics Group, Inc., a medical technology company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TMDX, revealed the selection of Mr. Gerardo to a key position. The company specializes in revolutionizing organ transplant treatments for individuals suffering from end-stage lung, heart, and liver conditions.

news.headline: ZIM company to update withholding tax procedures for December 2024 regular and special cash dividends.
news.summary: Israel's ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd. (NYSE: ZIM) based in Haifa, has announced updates regarding regular and special dividend distributions scheduled for December 2, 2024. The global container liner shipping company's shareholders can anticipate these distributions as part of company operations.

news.headline: Interparfums, Inc. to develop Off-White brand in fragrance and beauty; 72% owned subsidiary to begin commercial use in 2025.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Interparfums, Inc. revealed that its 72% owned French subsidiary, Interparfums SA, has successfully acquired all Off-White brand names and trademarks designated for Class 3 fragrance and cosmetic goods. This acquisition is subject to an ongoing license that will conclude on December 31, 2025, at which point Interparfums will commence utilizing the fragrance brands for commercial purposes. Both entities plan to foster a robust, enduring alliance aimed at collaborating on various strategies, launching products in different categories, and implementing market initiatives.

news.headline: Portillo's names Tony Darden as COO, with 30 years of experience. Company known for Chicago-style menu. (Character count: 97)
news.summary: A seasoned professional with 30 years of experience in the restaurant industry has joined Portillo's to aid in the company's expansion across the country. Portillo's, a renowned fast-casual restaurant famous for its Chicago-style dishes, disclosed the news on December 2, 2024. The business, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PTLO, looks to capitalize on the expertise of the new addition to further its national growth strategy.

news.headline: Inari Medical partners with 6 Dimensions Capital and VFLO Medical to bring technology to Greater China.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Inari Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: NARI) disclosed a new collaboration. The medical device company has partnered with 6 Dimensions Capital and its successor fund, 120 Capital, along with VFLO Medical. VFLO Medical is a medical device platform that originated from 6 Dimensions and 120 Capital. The aim of this joint venture is to extend access to Inari’s advanced technology to patients in Greater China facing substantial medical needs. This strategic move is intended to address the needs of patients suffering from venous and other diseases in the region, with the goal of improving their quality of life.

news.headline: Real estate giants Compass, Christie's International, @properties, and Ansley come together. Christie's has 100+ affiliates in 50 countries.
news.summary: With more than 100 affiliates in nearly 50 countries and territories globally, Christie's International Real Estate has established a strong partnership with the renowned Christie's Auction House. In the US, @properties ranks as the 8th largest residential brokerage based on sales volume. Additionally, they are known for providing top-notch title services.

news.headline: IAS to feature CEO Lisa Utzschneider & CFO Tania Secor at upcoming investor conferences. (Nasdaq: IAS)
news.summary: Integral Ad Science, a prominent global media measurement and optimization platform listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IAS, revealed on December 2, 2024, that both Lisa Utzschneider, the CEO, and Tania Secor, the CFO, will engage in fireside discussions at various investor conferences. Lisa Utzschneider and Tania Secor are set to participate in discussions at significant events such as Raymond...

news.headline: Biomea Fusion, Inc. granted 30,000 stock options to one new employee under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: Biomea Fusion, Inc., based in Redwood City, California, and listed as Nasdaq: BMEA, a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage, specializing in oral covalent small molecules for diabetes, obesity, and genetically defined cancers treatment, disclosed a recent development. On December 2, 2024, the compensation committee of Biomea's board of directors awarded a new employee with non-qualified stock options for the purchase of 30,000 shares of the company's common stock. The stock options will vest gradually over four years, with 1/16th vesting quarterly, contingent on the employee's continuous service with the company. This allocation was part of Biomea's 2023 Inducement Equity Plan.

news.headline: NKGen Biotech chosen as a preferred bidder for NKMax with $18 million funding for court-managed rehabilitation in South Korea.
news.summary: NKGen Biotech, Inc., a biotechnology company, has been chosen as the preferred stalking horse bidder for NKMax Co., Ltd. in South Korea's court-managed rehabilitation process. NKMax, holding a 25% equity interest in NKGen, filed for rehabilitation in April 2024. NKGen's proposal includes up to $18 million in funding from a third-party investor. The final decision on the acquisition is expected in February 2025, with NKGen and its partners likely holding a majority of NKMax's equity.
